titles.en: A Characteristic That Revives the Affairs of the Almighty God’s Proofs
A Characteristic That Revives the Affairs of the Almighty God’s Proofs

segments: : حدثنا علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن محمد بن حمران، عن خيثمة قال: قال لي أبوجعفر عليه السلام: تزاوروا في بيوتكم فإن ذلك حياة لامرنا، رحم الله عبدا أحيا أمرنا
arabic.text: : حدثنا علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن محمد بن حمران، عن خيثمة قال: قال لي أبوجعفر عليه السلام: تزاوروا في بيوتكم فإن ذلك حياة لامرنا، رحم الله عبدا أحيا أمرنا

segments: 1-77 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ali ibn Ibrahim quoted on the authority of his father, on the authority of Ibn Abi Umayr, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Hamran, on the authority of Khaysamat that Abu Ja’far al-Baqir (MGB) told him, “Visit each other in your homes since this will revive our affairs - may God forgive anyone who revives our affairs.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 1-77 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ali ibn Ibrahim quoted on the authority of his father, on the authority of Ibn Abi Umayr, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Hamran, on the authority of Khaysamat that Abu Ja’far al-Baqir (MGB) told him, “Visit each other in your homes since this will revive our affairs - may God forgive anyone who revives our affairs.”

narratorChain.raw: 1-77 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال
